name: io.github.codespar/mcp-konduto
description: MCP server for Konduto — Brazilian fraud prevention, API-first order risk scoring, behavioral device intelligence, and blocklist/allowlist/reviewlist management

environmentVariables.name: KONDUTO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Konduto API key (private key). Used as the Basic auth username with an empty password.

environmentVariables.name: KONDUTO_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Konduto API base URL. Defaults to https://api.konduto.com/v1.
